title: English Housing Survey 2023 to 2024: climate resilient homes - fact sheet
body: "This fact sheet brings together evidence on how prepared homes are for climate change by focusing on dwelling age in relation to dwelling characteristics, self-reported overheating, ability of households to keep warm during winter and self-reported moisture damage to homes following a storm. It also explores working from home and energy costs and the reasons households carried out or didn’t carry out EPC recommendations on their home. "
